name: envpact-action
description: GitHub Action for envpact — sync secrets from your private vault to CI/CD

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.js --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=cjs --outfile=dist/index.js --packages=external && cp src/index.js dist/index.cjs.js || true

author: Chirag Singhal <whyiswhen@gmail.com>
